ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the ballet organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for official communications */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization reporting the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial report */,
  "reported_end_balance" REAL /* Reported end balance for the organization */,
  "calculated_end_balance" REAL /* Calculated end balance based on internal accounting */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between reported and calculated end balances */,
  "budget_planned" REAL /* Planned budget for the year */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the year */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the year */,
  "report_submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact who approved the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value for financial reporting */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact person */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization the contact belongs to */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contact person in the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "is_primary_contact" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the contact is the primary point of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "insights" TEXT /* Insights derived from the analysis of the financial report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_analysis_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
